observations.detail: lib/run-agent.sh uses eval to pass AUTO_FLAG to claude CLI. AUTO_FLAG is only set from --auto argument, not user input, so injection risk is minimal but worth documenting.
136 placeholder tokens across 7 templates. As client count grows, a placeholder miss report after each training-builder run would reduce delivery QA time.
No agents/gtm-deploy.md yet — Full GTM Deployment (Step 5 on value ladder) has no agent playbook. High-value to build next.
136 placeholder tokens across 7 templates — training-builder must replace all of them from client config. High-risk area for incomplete output.
Placeholder miss rate will be the #1 source of delivery quality issues. Mitigation: delivery-packager quality check already scans for '{{' in outputs.
expert-series.md references sibling repo path '../expert-series-v3/' — path validation missing from agent
Add path existence check to expert-series.md Phase 1 before attempting to use sibling repo
